localization.name: Elemental Palette
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Element type on the battlefield. (e.g. Elemental Sweep: 50% => 350% damage when 3 Element types are on the battlefield)

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water or Dark, Stun them for 100TU.
- Fire or Light, grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Storm or Earth, grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

localization.name: Immovable
localization.description: This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

localization.name: Sleep Immunity
localization.description: This unit is not affected by sleep effects.
